THOUGHT: The verifier failure persists because GVN still replaces the alloca with null due to equality propagation from llvm.assume. A simple and safe fix is to block propagating the equality when attempting to replace an AllocaInst with a null pointer constant. This prevents turning the lifetime operands into null and respects the verifier rule. I will modify GVN.cpp in propagateEquality to skip replacements when LHS is an AllocaInst and RHS is a ConstantPointerNull, then submit the patch.

```bash
python3 - << 'PY'
import pathlib, re, sys, subprocess, textwrap
p = pathlib.Path("llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/GVN.cpp")
s = p.read_text()
# Find propagateEquality function start
func_m = re.search(r'bool\s+GVNPass::propagateEquality\s*\([^)]*\)\s*\{', s)
if not func_m:
    print("Failed to locate propagateEquality", file=sys.stderr)
    sys.exit(1)
func_start = func_m.end()
# Within the loop, after type equality assertion, insert guard to avoid replacing alloca with null
loop_m = re.search(r'while\s*\(!Worklist\.empty\(\)\)\s*\{[\s\S]*?assert\(LHS->getType\(\)\s*==\s*RHS->getType\(\)\s*&&\s*"Equality but unequal types!"\);\s*', s[func_start:])
if not loop_m:
    print("Failed to locate position for insertion in propagateEquality loop", file=sys.stderr)
    sys.exit(1)
insert_pos = func_start + loop_m.end()
insertion = textwrap.dedent('''
    // Do not propagate equality that would replace an alloca with null.
    // This can cause llvm.lifetime.start/end to operate on null, which is invalid.
    if (isa<AllocaInst>(LHS)) {
      if (isa<ConstantPointerNull>(RHS))
        continue;
    }
''')
s = s[:insert_pos] + insertion + s[insert_pos:]
p.write_text(s)
subprocess.run(["submit-patch"], check=False)
PY
```

The existing pointer replacement predicate disallows replacing pointer operands of load/store generally to avoid AA metadata issues, but we should allow it for volatile stores.         // Allow replacing pointer operand for volatile stores.

          if (const StoreInst *SI = dyn_cast<StoreInst>(UserI2)) {
            if (SI->isVolatile())
              return true;
          }
        }
''')
s = s[:body_start] + insertion + s[body_start:]
